bind.conflict: The external identity is already bound to another account

identity.invalid: External identity provider and subject cannot be empty

not.found: The external identity is not bound to the current account

query.failed: Failed to query external identity linkage

write.failed: Failed to write external identity linkage

email.conflict: An account with the same email already exists. Sign in to that account and bind this identity instead

provision.failed: Failed to provision an account for the external identity

not.allowed: Automatic account provisioning is not enabled for this login

ticket.invalid: Verified identity ticket is invalid or expired
ticket.unavailable: Verified identity ticket service is temporarily unavailable

handoff.invalid: External login handoff is invalid or expired

not.supported: This external identity operation is not supported yet

not.found: External identity provider is not registered
